name: BNO085 9-DOF Sensor Fusion IMU
description: CEVA BNO085 9-DOF IMU with on-chip sensor fusion (quaternion output) - Adafruit/SparkFun flagship IMU. Host interface selected by PS1/PS0: I2C 0x4A/0x4B, SPI, or UART. VDD 2.4-3.6V, LGA-28 5.2x3.8. Needs 32.768kHz crystal or CLKSEL strap.
dimensions_source: CEVA BNO08X datasheet v1.17: Fig.7-1 LGA-28 5.2x3.8 (pads 0.25x0.475 x20 + 0.375x0.25 x8, pitch 0.5, bottom-view CW numbering mirrored for footprint - verified by direct drawing read); Fig.7-2 recommended land (0.675x0.25 rows flush 3.8, 0.575x0.25 cols flush 5.2 - outer-edge spans, vector-verified). Pinout Table 1-2.
